jgnActs.jgnFactShow: MonitorObservesEntry( $M, $L, <$CA, $id, pkID, 'pubKey', sn, $i, $j>, <<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA) >, ~sth, ~session)
Asserts( $M, 'Blame this CA.', $CA, <<$CA, $id, pkID, 'pubKey', sn, $i, $j>, $rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>)

jgnPrems.jgnFactShow: In( sign(<$CA, $id, pkID, 'pubKey', sn, $i, $j, sct1.1, sct2.1>, ~skCA))

jgnActs.jgnFactShow: Asserts( 'CCADB', 'No root CA signed this CA.', $CA, <<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, $rootCA>)

jgnConcs.jgnFactShow: !Check( pk(~skL), <$CA, $id, pkID, 'pubKey', sn, $i, $j>, <<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA) >)
!Check( pk(~skL.1), <$CA, $id, pkID, 'pubKey', sn, $i, $j>, <<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA) >)

jgnPrems.jgnFactShow: In( <$CA, $id, pkID, 'pubKey', sn, $i, $j, <$L, 'SCT', $sct1, sign(<$L, 'SCT', $sct1, $CA, $id, pkID, sn, $i, $j>, ~skL)>, $L2, 'SCT', $sct2, sign(<$L2, 'SCT', $sct2, $CA, $id, pkID, sn, $i, $j>, ~skL.1)>)

In( sign(<$CA, $id, pkID, 'pubKey', sn, $i, $j, <$L, 'SCT', $sct1, sign(<$L, 'SCT', $sct1, $CA, $id, pkID, sn, $i, $j>, ~skL)>, $L2, 'SCT', $sct2, sign(<$L2, 'SCT', $sct2, $CA, $id, pkID, sn, $i, $j>, ~skL.1)>, ~skCA))

jgnActs.jgnFactShow: LoggerComputesAddLog( $L, $log_id, <$CA, $id, pkID, 'pubKey', sn, $i, $j>, <<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA) >, < <<$CA, $id, pkID, 'pre-cert', sn, $i, $j>, sign(<$CA, $id, pkID, 'pre-cert', sn, $i, $j>, ~skCA)>, <$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', snCA, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA) >, $sct1)

K( <$CA, $id, pkID, 'pubKey', sn, $i, $j, <$L, 'SCT', $sct1, sign(<$L, 'SCT', $sct1, $CA, $id, pkID, sn, $i, $j>, ~skL)>, $L2, 'SCT', $sct2, sign(<$L2, 'SCT', $sct2, $CA, $id, pkID, sn, $i, $j>, ~skL.1)>)

jgnConcs.jgnFactShow: In( <$CA, $id, pkID, 'pubKey', sn, $i, $j, <$L, 'SCT', $sct1, sign(<$L, 'SCT', $sct1, $CA, $id, pkID, sn, $i, $j>, ~skL)>, $L2, 'SCT', $sct2, sign(<$L2, 'SCT', $sct2, $CA, $id, pkID, sn, $i, $j>, ~skL.1)>)
